english_news.title: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
english_news.summary: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts, a dynamic that's forcing investors to watch interest rates.

english_news.title: The budget airline model in the U.S. is running out of runway
english_news.summary: Spirit's bankruptcy as United and Delta fly high suggests there's more to success in airline industry than low fares, and failure isn't about jet fuel spikes.

english_news.title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
english_news.summary: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.

english_news.title: SNAP restrictions could change what shoppers buy — and food giants are watching
english_news.summary: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.

english_news.title: Musk's SpaceX stake is worth over $1 trillion. Here are the other billionaire shareholders
english_news.summary: SpaceX shares were up 37% after its historic debut last week, which offered shares at a set price of $135.

english_news.title: Memory crisis hits such extremes that 'even Apple can't be safe'
english_news.summary: Apple appears poised to take the rare step of increasing prices to deal with what CEO Tim Cook called an "unsustainable" memory shortage.

english_news.title: In photos: Star-studded crowd gathers to celebrate the Obama Presidential Center dedication
english_news.summary: Barack Obama opened his presidential center in Chicago with former presidents, celebrities and dignitaries in attendance. President Donald Trump was absent.

english_news.title: DOJ rebuffs judge's request to put in writing it won't move forward with 'anti-weaponization' fund
english_news.summary: The DOJ in May announced it was creating the fund as part of a settlement of President Donald Trump's $10 billion lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service.

english_news.title: Israel and Hezbollah continue strikes despite ceasefire agreement
english_news.summary: Deaths are reported in southern Lebanon, with the IDF saying it hit Hezbollah targets after the group fired over 50 projectiles at Israeli forces.

english_news.title: Zelensky stripped of highest Polish honour over WW2 name of army unit
english_news.summary: Ukraine has denounced the move, calling it a "strategic mistake" and "disrespectful".

english_news.title: Tourist dies in Dominican Republic luxury resort fire
english_news.summary: Nearly 1,700 people were evacuated from the huge blaze at Viva Wyndham Dominicus Beach in Bayahibe, a popular resort town on the Caribbean coast.

english_news.title: Trump hits out at Italy's Meloni after pushback on G7 photo claim
english_news.summary: Trump said the Italian leader asked "over and over" for a picture at G7, after she said the US president "made-up" a story that she "begged" for a photo.

english_news.title: US to stop funding HIV programmes in South Africa
english_news.summary: More than eight million South Africans are living with HIV – the highest number of any country in the world.

english_news.title: Watch: World Cup fans react to US defeating Australia to reach knockout round
english_news.summary: US supporters were delighted after their team won 2-0 against the Socceroos while Australian fans were left disappointed but still hopeful.

english_news.title: Australia confirms first case of H5N1 bird flu as virus reaches every continent
english_news.summary: Australia was previously the only continent where the H5N1 bird flu strain had not yet been found.

english_news.title: African and Caribbean nations call for formal apology for transatlantic slavery
english_news.summary: The leaders have asked for apologies from the countries that benefited from the slave trade, as well as debt relief and financial compensation.

chinese_news.title: 硬氪首发|moody前高管搭档大疆骨干入局陪伴机器人，锦秋领投，融资数千万
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，AI-Native科技潮玩品牌ZuzuZoos查无此园（杭州多蓝艾梦智能科技旗下）近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，锦秋领投、上海复容跟投。此次融资将主要AI大模型迭代、硬件产品扩建、IP生态深化、全球市场拓展、核心团队扩容。

ZuzuZoos成立于2025年，聚焦“AI陪伴机器人+AI潮玩”。创始人董晓楠是前摩根士丹利投资银行分析师，曾任新消费独角兽企业moody事业部总经理，任职期间拉动GMV从2亿元增长至10亿元。硬件负责人是前大疆清扫机器人机械结构负责人，深耕机器人及智能硬件领域15余年，主导多款机器人研发与落地。IP设计团队来自泡泡玛特、迪士尼等IP大厂，AI团队来自智谱等头部大模型公司。

当下，陪伴机器人赛道已经涌入大量玩家，许多公司追求“更聪明”，董晓楠表示，ZuzuZoos更在意如何让AI角色真正为用户提供情绪体验，于是选择了一条差异化路径：不只是把AI机器人做成“会聊天的电子宠物”，而是尝试把AI、潮玩与IP世界观结合，创造一个有“活人感”和持续生命力的硅基伙伴。

“潮玩的底色本就带有反叛精神，消费

chinese_news.title: 安踏发布“折纸科技”，试图从结构设计寻找跑鞋缓震新方向
chinese_news.summary:
36氪获悉，6月16日，安踏在上海创新创意设计研究院发布全新跑鞋技术平台“折纸科技（ANTA FOLD）”，并同步推出首款搭载该技术的跑鞋产品折纸H1。

过去十余年，运动鞋行业的创新主要围绕材料展开。从EVA、TPU到Pebax等高性能发泡材料，各大品牌持续通过中底材料升级提升缓震与回弹表现。近年来，随着材料性能逐渐接近瓶颈，越来越多品牌开始将研发重点延伸至结构设计领域，希望通过几何构型优化进一步释放性能空间。

安踏此次推出的“折纸科技”，正是这一趋势下的最新尝试。

根据安踏介绍，该项目由安踏创新实验室联合牛津大学、天津大学及浙江大学相关研究团队共同研发。与传统依赖材料软硬度实现缓震不同，折纸科技试图利用特定折叠结构实现受力形变与能量管理，从而构建一套新的中底缓震方案。

其核心思路源于折纸工程学（Origami Engineering）。

作为一门融合数学、材料学与结构力学的交叉学科，折纸工程近年来已被广泛应用于航空航天、机器人、医疗器械等领域。通过特定的折叠几何结构，材料能够在有限空间内实

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 两轮电动车没有天花板，爱玛黑翼要用AI与硬核科技赢得年轻男性的心
chinese_news.summary: 国内两轮电动车市场正悄然迎来一场深层次的“基因突变”。长期以来，大众对两轮电动车的认知被牢牢框定在“代步工具”与“大众精品”的传统叙事里。然而，在四川省体育馆的一场发布会上，爱玛正式发布了旗下专为年轻男性打造的极速运动品类品牌——“爱玛黑翼”（AIMA BLACK WING）。首位中国F1车手周冠宇化身“全速领航员”在线助力，爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版以及爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款硬核新品集结亮相。这场动作透露出的创投信号再明显不过：在女性和基础通勤赛道筑牢绝对壁垒后，传统头部巨头爱玛正以一种颠覆性的姿态，正式向年轻男性性能与运动电摩赛道发起总攻。36氪通过与爱玛科技集团三位核心高管的深度专访，试图拆解两轮电动车从功能代步全面迈向体验升级的下半场逻辑，看他们如何锚定Z世代的硬核社交货币，打破行业所谓的“天花板”。

chinese_news.title: 科氪 | 纯粹热爱的城市探索玩家而来 ，爱玛黑翼三大新车集结亮相
chinese_news.summary:
6月17日，爱玛黑翼品牌战略发布会在四川省体育馆盛大开启。体育馆化身爱玛黑翼玩家街区，潮流青年齐聚现场。爱玛黑翼以“全速热爱”为品牌主张，携爱玛黑翼S360电竞版、爱玛黑翼S360赛道版、爱玛黑翼S790赛博版三款车型重磅亮相，首位中国F1车手周冠宇以爱玛黑翼“全速领航员”身份在线助力品牌发布。爱玛黑翼的登场，标志着爱玛电动车在男性出行科技领域树立起全新坐标，正式构建起“他硬核”增长格局，向“时尚科技年轻品牌”全速进阶。

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报｜BilibiliWorld 2026成国内首个海外售票的综合性ACG展会；让AI走进千家万户，17项举措推进“人工智能+消费”发展；快舟十一号遥十三运载火箭发射成功
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

滴滴自动驾驶参加伦敦MOVE 2026大会

6月17至18日，MOVE 2026大会在英国伦敦召开，滴滴自动驾驶在会上分享了来自中国的自动驾驶落地实践。在AI技术方面，滴滴自动驾驶已实现L4级全栈核心技术的自主可控；硬件方面，与广汽埃安联合打造的新一代Robotaxi车型R2已于今年1月交付，正持续在广州和北京等地开展道路测试；在场景应用上，自去年四季度在广州、北京部分示范应用区域开启全天候载客测试以来，滴滴自动驾驶始终保持安全稳定的运行表现。

chinese_news.title: 蔚来补上“智驾课”，任少卿总结：智驾技术创新将重构竞争
chinese_news.summary:
文｜肖漫
编辑｜李勤

6月18日，蔚来同时向两代平台车型（包含8款NT2.0平台车型、4款NT2.5平台车型，以及6款NT3.0车型）推送了最新版的世界模型，这意味着，蔚来现在能让同一套复杂的智驾代码，现在能跑在不同代际的芯片上。

软件迭代节奏被硬件绑架曾是一个困扰行业的难题。很多车企无法在不同版本、配置的车型上迭代同一款软件，这带来的结果是，很长时间内只有使用最新版本硬件的车才能用上最好的软件，老车主被背刺。

蔚来部署推理跨平台兼容

chinese_news.title: 中国游戏的错位竞争：头部赌3A，腰部吃存量 | 游戏风向标
chinese_news.summary:
文丨小葵

编辑丨果脯

中国游戏产业正站在一个微妙的分水岭上。

一边，腾讯网易等头部大厂利用资本，以全球资源整合或漫长自研周期，向代表行业塔尖的3A单机游戏发起冲锋；另一边，以4399百奥为代表的腰部力量，在各自深耕的细分赛道里，通过成熟玩法复刻与精细化运营，稳守利润阵地。

今年夏日游戏节的发布会上，数十家全球顶尖游戏厂商轮番登台，发布了超过50款新作的最新消息。

在海外大厂普遍打出“老IP重制+续作”保守牌局中，腾讯和网易同时拿出3A级的单机产品，并肩出现在全球顶级展会的聚光灯下。

当大厂渴望用3A讲述中国故事建立全球品牌壁垒，腰部厂商则在存量市场中持续收割，一个向上押注3A，一个向下蚕食存量。这两条看似背道而驰的路，正共用着同一个起点。

01

本次SGF上，腾讯拿出《穿越火线：潜伏》与《古剑》堪称两张风格迥异的牌。

chinese_news.title: 12306要忙着赚钱了
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 王晗玉

编辑 | 张帆

近日，市场监管总局联合中央网信办、国家铁路局，依法约谈携程、同程、去哪儿、飞猪、美团、智行火车票、高铁管家7家旅游出行第三方平台，直指平台在火车票销售领域存在多项不规范经营行为。

具体来看，违规行为包括不当宣传“候补帮抢”及付费选座、不当诱导用户“买长乘短”“买短乘长”，不当收集、使用用户个人信息等问题。后续监管部门将加大监管执法力度。

此次集中约谈，不仅直指OTA平台火车票业务的乱象根源，也揭开了在线旅游行业围绕出行流量展开的深层博弈。

监管收紧的背景下，传统OTA依赖的流量逻辑正在动摇，而铁路官方平台跨界拓展酒旅业务的可能性，也让整个在线出行行业迎来新一轮变数。

抢票“加速包”，OTA的“流量加速包”

每逢各大、小长假，打开OTA平台的火车票页面，“极速抢票”“候补加速”“高成功率帮抢”等标语便铺天盖地，甚至

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $70,000 by December 31, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once by June 30, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will NVIDIA (NVDA) stock outperform the S&P 500 by >10% through December 31, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (memory shortage unsustainable, Apple price hikes); CoinDesk (AI buildout continues); trending crypto capex signals

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will XRP close above $2.50 by August 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will SpaceX's share price exceed $200 per share by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Public SpaceX secondary market pricing (Forge, EquityZen, or official shareholder announcements); last known close was $135 post-debut.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Recent 37% pop post-IPO debut has not yet priced in Starship production ramp or Starlink IPO anticipation; Musk billionaire wealth story drives institutional FOMO.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: SpaceX shares up 37% post-historic debut; Musk stake worth >$1 trillion; Starship cadence accelerating per aerospace headlines

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Apple (AAPL) announce a price increase of >5% on average selling price (ASP) in its next earnings call (Q3 2026)?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Apple official earnings call transcript and guidance; CEO Tim Cook's explicit ASP commentary on memory shortage.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Tim Cook called memory shortage 'unsustainable'; Apple rarely raises prices mid-cycle unless supply is truly broken. Market has not fully priced margin defense via ASP.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Memory crisis so extreme 'even Apple can't be safe'; Tim Cook signals price action; semiconductor supply chain remains tight

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Pudgy Penguins (PENGU) trading volume on major exchanges exceed $50M in a single day before June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, Coingecko 24h volume tracker, or official PENGU exchange data; resolvable via Twitter/X PENGU community announcement.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Target retail rollout + NFT-to-physical product bridge is a proven model (Pudgy Penguins vibes series 3); mainstream adoption underpriced vs. Blur/OpenSea volume potential.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Pudgy Penguins expands to Target stores; Vibes Series 3 trading card rollout signals mainstream product momentum

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the Philippine SEC formally approve at least one tokenized real estate or utility asset issuance under RWA rules by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official Philippine SEC press release or regulatory gazette; Commissioner Rogelio Quevedo's public statement.
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SEC commissioner publicly signaled 'readiness'; first-mover advantage in Asia-Pacific RWA tokenization is geopolitically significant and underhyped in Western markets.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph: Philippine SEC Commissioner signals RWA tokenization readiness; framed as fraud-prevention tool for retail investors

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana (SOL) close above $250 USD by September 30, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SOL in trending top 10; Hyperliquid (HYPE) and Bittensor (TAO) momentum suggest alternative-chain infrastructure play is live; memory crisis favors high-throughput chains.

investment_theses.thesis: Tech mega-cap debt issuance for data center buildout will steepen the 2Y–10Y yield curve and create tactical long DXY / short long-duration Treasuries opportunity through Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Tech giants depleting cash reserves, raising debt for AI capex buildout
CNBC: Bond market dynamics forcing investors to watch interest rates
CoinDesk: Memory shortage driving urgent hardware capex cycles
investment_theses.counter_view: If Fed signals imminent rate cuts due to recession fears, duration outperforms and curve flattens, unwinding long-DXY positioning.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY (US Dollar Index ETF), short TLT (iShares 20+ Year Treasury ETF), or DXY/TLT ratio trade

investment_theses.thesis: Memory chip shortage (DRAM/NAND) will persist through Q3 2026, forcing NVDA and MU to sustain pricing power and margin compression will be less severe than consensus expects; buy MU (Micron) over SPY.

CoinDesk: Memory crisis cascades into AI buildout timelines
Tech giants capex acceleration signals sustained supply deficit
investment_theses.counter_view: New fab capacity from Samsung/SK Hynix comes online faster than expected, flooding DRAM market and collapsing ASP by late 2026.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU (Micron Technology), hedge with put ratio on SPY; or MU outperformance vs. SPY (ratio trade)

investment_theses.thesis: BTC/USD holds >$65k through June 2026 as institutional adoption (Schwab prediction markets, Franklin Templeton dividend ETF, SpaceX/billionaire wealth narrative) provides bid; retest of 2021 ATH ($69k) becomes consensus by Q4 2026.

supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Bitcoin narrative as 'revolutionary as smartphone'; institutional ETF products proliferating
Franklin Templeton: Dividend-to-BTC conversion ETF signals liability-driven institutional inflows
CNBC: SpaceX/Musk wealth narrative drives billionaire asset allocation
investment_theses.counter_view: Macro shock (Fed hawkish surprise, geopolitical escalation Israel/Hezbollah, recession) crushes risk appetite and BTC retests $45k by Q3 2026.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot (or BTC USD perps on Binance/Hyperliquid), hedge with long-duration USD or VIX calls

investment_theses.thesis: SOL outperforms BTC/ETH through September 2026 as memory shortage and AI buildout reward high-throughput, low-latency chains; TAO (Bittensor) and HYPE (Hyperliquid) as leveraged plays on same macro.
supporting_signals: Crypto trending: SOL, HYPE, TAO all top movers concurrently
CoinDesk: Smart-contract and DeFi coins lead losses (short-term pain, but consolidation sets up breakout)
Memory crisis + AI capex = infrastructure play, not L1 war of token narrative
investment_theses.counter_view: Ethereum Shanghai/Dencun upgrades and staking yield resurgence drive ETH/BTC outperformance; SOL congestion or security incidents trigger relative underperformance.
investment_theses.expression: Long SOL/BTC ratio, or long SOL with short ETH/BTC hedge; or long HYPE/TAO as levered exposure

investment_theses.thesis: SNAP food restriction rollout (spreading to more states) will pressure packaged-food and beverage names (especially sugar/processed); long defensive food staples (MO, KO, PEP), short junky consumer discretionary through 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: SNAP restrictions spreading; food giants watching; consumers shifting spend away from soda, candy, processed foods
Policy momentum suggests continued SNAP tightening through 2026 state budgets
investment_theses.counter_view: SNAP restrictions prove politically unpopular in swing states; rollback accelerates and consumer spending on restricted items rebounds; momentum reverts.
investment_theses.expression: Long MO (Altria / tobacco), short IYK (iShares U.S. Food & Beverage ETF) or specific positions in sugary snack names; or long KO relative to PepsiCo (cleaner portfolio)
